text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 111 

FIXD_PYMT_IND 

LABEL: Fixed Payment Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This indicator indicates that the reimbursement amount included on the claim is for a fixed payment. 

SHORT NAME: FIXD_PYMT_IND 

LONG NAME: FIXD_PYMT_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX header 

VALUES: 0 = Not Fixed Payment 
1 =
